finalized_plan.description: Identify the list of ASEAN member countries from Wikipedia, ensuring the list is complete
Find the capital city of each ASEAN country using their corresponding Wikipedia pages or the ASEAN article
Extract the geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of each capital city from their Wikipedia pages
Use the haversine formula to calculate the great‐circle distances between each pair of capital cities
Determine which pair of capitals has the maximum geographical distance
Map the identified capitals back to their countries
Order the two country names alphabetically and format them as a comma‐separated list

root_cause_reasoning: The answer is correct, but the model generated the answer without verifying it through search.
